actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour fileID 1090992649 on 'Spot Light' uses script guid 376688c5b82056e4da4c2b159887a7dc (ToggleLight). Serialized isOn=0; Start() will set Light.enabled=false. Manually call TurnOn() to enable the light (expect currentLight.enabled == true). No m_Calls configured in scene; manual trigger needed.

After TurnOn(), light should be enabled. Call TurnOff() to set isOn=false and disable the light (expect currentLight.enabled == false). Component: MonoBehaviour fileID 1090992649, guid 376688c5b82056e4da4c2b159887a7dc.
With light currently off, call Flip() to toggle isOn. Expect isOn=true and Light.enabled=true. Component: MonoBehaviour fileID 1090992649 (ToggleLight), initial isOn in scene: 0.
